name: epistole
description: Read, search, send, and manage email via IMAP and SMTP, with local semantic search and PDF attachment indexing.
long_description: Epistole connects Claude to your email account over standard IMAP (port 993, TLS) and SMTP (port 465, SSL) protocols. v2 adds a local sync layer that incrementally polls your mailbox, saves attachments to disk, extracts text from digital PDFs, and indexes everything into a local vector database (ChromaDB + model2vec) for semantic search. All data stays on your machine — no cloud APIs are used for embedding or search.

full_name.title: Full Name
full_name.description: Your name as it should appear in sent emails

imap_username.title: IMAP Username
imap_username.description: IMAP login (usually same as email address)

smtp_username.title: SMTP Username
smtp_username.description: SMTP login (usually same as email address)

sync_folders.title: Sync Folders
sync_folders.description: Comma-separated folder names to sync (leave empty for all)

sync_interval_minutes.title: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to poll for new messages

tools.name: read_inbox
tools.description: List recent messages from inbox or any folder

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search messages using IMAP search criteria

tools.name: get_message
tools.description: Get full content of a specific message by UID

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Compose and send a new email

tools.name: reply_to_message
tools.description: Reply to an existing email message

tools.name: move_message
tools.description: Move a message to a different folder

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description: Search emails by meaning using local vector search across subject, body, and PDF attachments

tools.name: get_attachments
tools.description: List attachments for a message from local disk (fast, no IMAP call)

tools.name: sync_now
tools.description: Trigger an immediate mailbox sync cycle

tools.name: sync_status
tools.description: Check sync progress, per-folder stats, and recent errors

tools.name: find_by_thread
tools.description: Find all messages in a thread by Message-ID or subject
